title: Hilka Tools PTCSD36 Li-Ion Cordless Screwdriver, 3.6 V, Black/Blue
features: Cordless screwdriver with forward/reverse function. Compact and lightweight, ideal for tight areas with ergonomic soft grip handle.
Li-ion technology offers long run time between charges. Ideal for screw driving tasks around your home with LED work light.
LED work light Charging time: 3-5 hours (AC/DC adaptor, 230V - 50Hz, BS plug)
description: From the manufacturer Hilka PTCSD36 3.6v Li-ion Cordless Screwdriver Product Description Cordless screwdriver with forward/reverse function. Compact and lightweight, ideal for tight areas with ergonomic soft grip handle. Li-ion technology offers long run time between charges. Ideal for screw driving tasks around your home with LED work light. Supplied with 11 popular 25mm bits, 1 magnetic bit holder and USB charger.
